title: Daily Stock picks delivered to Inbox
author: Adventurous_Chart360
selftext:
[TradebotEngine.com](http://TradebotEngine.com) offers an **AI-powered trading signals service** that:

* Scans the markets daily to identify statistically strong buy candidates, generating a set of **5 high-confidence stock signals** each day. [\[tradebotengine.com\]](https://tradebotengine.com/)
* Each recommendation includes a **confidence score (%)** and a **quality rating**, helping users prioritize which trades may be most promising. [\[tradebotengine.com\]](https://tradebotengine.com/)
* Signals are delivered via a **daily email**, with a promise of no spam and a simple unsubscribe mechanism. [\[tradebotengine.com\]](https://tradebotengine.com/)
* Performance data is provided for the past predictions. 
* All the data consolidated in single page for free subscribers.
